meaning: n.[植]除虫菊,[药]除虫菊杀虫剂
examples: Feverfew and pyrethrum are used in insecticides.
To evaluate the immune toxicity of natural pyrethrum.
This article draws up the pyrethrum ester insecticide.
First Wambugu isolates the gene that codes for the production of insecticidal pyrethrins in the pyrethrum flower and extracts them.
Into the sweet potato she spliced a gene from the pyrethrum, a white flower whose ingredients are fatal to insects and the feathery mottle virus.
